tldr_zh: Anthropic獲巨額融資，輝達進軍筆電晶片，AI應用與資安爭議並存，全球科技與政治動態頻繁。
tldr_en: Anthropic secures massive funding, Nvidia enters laptop chips, AI applications and security disputes emerge, alongside global tech and political shifts.

items.title_zh: Anthropic完成650億美元H輪融資，估值逼近1兆美元
items.title_en: Anthropic Secures $65 Billion H-Round Funding, Valuation Nears $1 Trillion
items.summary_zh: AI巨頭Anthropic宣布完成高達650億美元的H輪融資，使其投後估值達到驚人的9,650億美元。這筆資金將主要用於加速AI安全與可解釋性研究、擴充Claude模型所需的運算資源，並進一步擴大其產品與合作夥伴生態系，鞏固其在AI領域的領先地位。
items.summary_en: AI giant Anthropic announced the completion of a massive $65 billion H-round funding, pushing its post-money valuation to an astonishing $965 billion. This capital will primarily fuel AI safety and interpretability research, expand computing resources for its Claude models, and broaden its product and partner ecosystem, solidifying its leadership in the AI sector.

items.title_zh: 輝達、微軟、Arm聯手預告N1X筆電處理器新時代
items.title_en: Nvidia, Microsoft, and Arm Tease New N1X Laptop Processors
items.summary_zh: 輝達、微軟和Arm正公開預告輝達即將在Computex發表其基於Arm架構的N1X筆電處理器。此舉標誌著輝達正式進軍PC處理器市場，可能為Windows筆電帶來新的AI運算能力與效能競爭，預計將重塑筆電產業格局。
items.summary_en: Nvidia, Microsoft, and Arm are openly teasing Nvidia's upcoming Arm-powered N1X laptop processors, expected to be announced at Computex. This move signifies Nvidia's formal entry into the PC processor market, potentially bringing new AI computing capabilities and performance competition to Windows laptops and reshaping the industry landscape.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出Rosalind Biodefense，強化生物防禦與公共衛生
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches Rosalind Biodefense for Enhanced Biodefense and Public Health
items.summary_zh: OpenAI正式推出「Rosalind Biodefense」平台，擴大GPT-Rosalind對經審查的開發者和美國政府合作夥伴的信任存取。此舉旨在透過前沿AI技術，推進生物防禦、公共衛生及大流行病應對準備工作，以應對全球生物安全挑戰。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has officially launched "Rosalind Biodefense," expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners. This initiative aims to advance biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI technology, addressing global biosafety challenges.

items.title_zh: SpaceX獲美國太空軍64.5億美元合約，打造飛彈追蹤衛星
items.title_en: SpaceX Awarded $6.45 Billion Space Force Contract for Missile-Tracking Satellites
items.summary_zh: 美國太空軍授予SpaceX一份高達64.5億美元的合約，用於建造飛彈追蹤衛星，這些衛星將與川普總統規劃的「黃金圓頂」防禦系統連結。這項重大合約不僅強化美國的太空防禦能力，也為SpaceX在首次公開募股（IPO）前帶來可觀的政府收入。
items.summary_en: The U.S. Space Force has awarded SpaceX a substantial $6.45 billion contract to build missile-tracking satellites, which will be linked to President Trump's planned "Golden Dome" defense system. This significant contract not only bolsters U.S. space defense capabilities but also provides substantial government revenue for SpaceX ahead of its potential IPO.

items.title_zh: 戴爾首季營收因AI伺服器需求飆升88%，創上市最快成長
items.title_en: Dell's Q1 Revenue Soars 88% Driven by Strong AI Server Demand
items.summary_zh: 電腦與伺服器大廠戴爾科技公布2027會計年度第一季財報，受惠於AI伺服器強勁需求，單季營收達438億美元，年增88%，創下2018年重新上市以來最快成長速度。這顯示AI熱潮正顯著推動硬體產業的營收增長，並超出市場預期。
items.summary_en: Dell Technologies reported its Q1 FY2027 earnings, with revenue reaching $43.8 billion, an 88% year-over-year increase, marking its fastest growth since relisting in 2018. This surge was primarily driven by robust demand for AI servers, underscoring how the AI boom is significantly boosting hardware industry revenues and exceeding market expectations.

items.title_zh: 微軟與資安研究員零日漏洞爭議升級，威脅再公開漏洞
items.title_en: Microsoft's 0-Day Feud Escalates as Researcher Threatens More Exploits
items.summary_zh: 微軟與一名獨立資安研究員之間的零日漏洞爭議持續升級，該研究員威脅將公開更多Windows系統的漏洞利用程式。這場爭議凸顯了軟體供應商與資安社群在漏洞揭露責任上的長期分歧，並引發對軟體安全實踐的廣泛討論。
items.summary_en: The dispute between Microsoft and an independent security researcher over a 0-day vulnerability has escalated, with the researcher threatening to dump more Windows exploits. This feud highlights the long-standing debate between software vendors and the security community regarding vulnerability disclosure responsibilities and sparks broader discussions on software security practices.

items.title_zh: AI晶片新創Groq傳將募資6.5億美元，專注AI推論市場
items.title_en: AI Chip Startup Groq Reportedly Raising $650 Million, Focusing on AI Inference
items.summary_zh: 在輝達以200億美元收購未果後，AI晶片新創Groq據報正尋求內部募資6.5億美元，並將戰略重心從硬體轉向AI推論。這筆資金將助其在快速成長的AI推論市場中佔據一席之地，與其他巨頭競爭。
items.summary_en: Following Nvidia's reported $20 billion "not-acqui-hire," AI chip startup Groq is reportedly seeking to raise $650 million in internal funding, pivoting its strategy from hardware to focus more on AI inference. This capital will help it secure a position in the rapidly growing AI inference market, competing with other industry giants.

items.title_zh: 臺灣氣象署導入AI預報模型，10分鐘快速模擬颱風動態
items.title_en: Taiwan's CWA Adopts AI Forecasting Model, Rapidly Simulating Typhoons in 10 Minutes
items.summary_zh: 臺灣中央氣象署展示AI氣象科技發展成果，成功導入AI預報模型，能於10分鐘內快速模擬颱風動態，大幅提升預報精度。這項技術轉變了傳統氣象預報模式，從CPU物理模擬轉向GPU資料驅動，對於因應極端氣候和複合型災害具有重要意義。
items.summary_en: Taiwan's Central Weather Administration (CWA) showcased its AI meteorological technology, successfully implementing an AI forecasting model that can rapidly simulate typhoon dynamics within 10 minutes, significantly improving prediction accuracy. This technology transforms traditional weather forecasting from CPU-based physical simulations to GPU-driven data, holding crucial importance for responding to extreme weather and complex disasters.

items.title_zh: AI新創提供免費居家清潔，以錄影方式蒐集機器人訓練數據
items.title_en: AI Startup Offers Free Home Cleaning for Robot Training Data Footage
items.summary_zh: 一家名為Shift的AI訓練新創公司，提供紐約客免費居家清潔服務，但條件是允許公司錄下清潔過程以蒐集機器人訓練數據。這項服務凸顯了AI產業對真實世界數據的龐大需求，以及為獲取數據而採取的創新（且具爭議性）策略。
items.summary_en: An AI training startup named Shift is offering free home cleaning services in New York, on the condition that the company can record the process to collect data for robot training. This initiative highlights the AI industry's immense demand for real-world data and the innovative (and controversial) strategies employed to acquire it.

items.title_zh: 藍色起源新格倫火箭測試爆炸，NASA登月計畫恐受影響
items.title_en: Blue Origin's New Glenn Rocket Explodes in Test, Potentially Impacting NASA Moon Plans
items.summary_zh: 藍色起源公司的新格倫（New Glenn）火箭在引擎點火測試中發生爆炸，導致其太空計畫面臨挫折。此事件不僅對藍色起源造成打擊，也可能對NASA的登月計畫產生連鎖影響，因為藍色起源是其重要的合作夥伴之一。
items.summary_en: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded during an engine-firing test, causing a setback for its space programs. This incident not only impacts Blue Origin but could also have ripple effects on NASA's Moon plans, as Blue Origin is a key partner.

items.title_zh: 川普將在白宮戰情室拍板，決定是否與伊朗達成和平協議
items.title_en: Trump to Make Final Decision on Iran Peace Deal in White House Situation Room
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普透過社群媒體宣布，他將在白宮戰情室做出是否與伊朗達成和平協議的最終決定。儘管川普表示華府將解除對伊朗的海上封鎖，但德黑蘭方面堅稱尚未達成最終共識，這項決策將對中東地區的穩定產生深遠影響。
items.summary_en: U.S. President Trump announced via social media that he would make a final decision on a potential peace deal with Iran in the White House Situation Room. While Trump indicated Washington would lift its naval blockade on Iran, Tehran insists no final agreement has been reached, and this decision will have profound implications for Middle East stability.
